body.title: Attractor-guided chunk scoring in reading pipeline
body.result: D356: attractor-guided chunk scoring. Scores chunks against hot_attractors keywords. High overlap → identity_weight=0.8, low overlap → skip. 7 new tests.
body.description: Before depositing a chunk, score it against hot_attractors centroid. High-overlap chunks get deep deposit + elevated identity_weight (lever nodes). Low-overlap chunks get shallow pass or skip. Makes Igor read like Akien — scan for levers, not cover-to-cover.
